---
title: "About"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="home-layout">

  <!-- LEFT: Bio -->
  <div class="home-left">
    <div class="hero-photo">
      <img src="bpMin.jpg" alt="Bladimir Padilla">
    </div>

    <h1>Bladimir</h1>
    <p class="subtitle">PhD Candidate · Psychological &amp; Quantitative Foundations · University of Iowa</p>

    <p>
      Hi! I am a graduate student in Educational Measurement and Statistics, broadly interested in
      multilevel and longitudinal analyses, psychometrics, and causal inference. My work sits at
      the intersection of educational outcomes and quantitative methods, with a particular focus
      on Chilean higher education.
    </p>

    <p>
      Before graduate school, I studied Social Work at the Universidad del Bío-Bío, Chile, and
      worked as a researcher at the Centro de Investigación Educativa CIDCIE at the same university.
    </p>

    <div class="section-title">Research Interests</div>
    <p><strong>Tools:</strong> Multilevel Analysis · Longitudinal Analysis · Causal Inference · Psychometrics</p>
    <p><strong>Topics:</strong> Higher Education Access &amp; Equity · Educational Quality &amp; School Climate · Quantitative Methods</p>

    <div class="section-title">News &amp; Updates</div>
    <p><strong>News coming soon.</strong></p>

  </div>

  <!-- RIGHT: Contact Card -->
  <div class="home-right">
    <div class="contact-card">

      <div class="contact-name">Contact Info</div>

      <hr class="contact-divider">

      <div class="contact-role">Email</div>
      <ul class="contact-list">
        <li>
          <span class="contact-icon">✉</span>
          <a href="mailto:gbpadilla@uiowa.edu">gbpadilla@uiowa.edu</a>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span class="contact-icon">✉</span>
          <a href="mailto:gpadilla@ubiobio.cl">gpadilla@ubiobio.cl</a>
        </li>
      </ul>

      <hr class="contact-divider">

      <div class="contact-role">Profiles</div>
      <div class="contact-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/Bladimir-PF" target="_blank">
          <i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub
        </a>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/bladimir-padilla/" target="_blank">
          <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
        </a>
        <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=yNsLTlwAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank">
          <i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Google Scholar
        </a>
        <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Bladimir-Padilla-2" target="_blank">
          <i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i> ResearchGate
        </a>
        <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0882-1818" target="_blank">
          iD ORCID
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
